description_long: This is a portable fire extinguisher with a cylindrical red metal body and a slightly domed top. The extinguisher features a prominent black discharge hose attached to a brass valve assembly at the top, with a black nozzle at the end. There are two black handles at the top, one fixed and one lever-style for operation, both attached to the brass valve. A large, rectangular label with Korean text and pictograms is affixed to the front of the cylinder, providing instructions and safety information. The surface is smooth and glossy, with the red color dominating the body and black and brass accents on the functional components. The extinguisher is designed for easy portability and quick access in emergency situations, commonly found in urban environments such as building corridors, garages, and public spaces.
description: A red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a black hose, brass valve, and instructional label in Korean. It features black handles and a glossy finish, designed for emergency use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the instructional label, brass valve, black handles, and the attached black hose and nozzle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the black hose and nozzle, with the handles and valve assembly visible from the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain red back of the cylinder, the attachment point of the hose, and the top valve assembly.
description_view_3: Angled view showing both the label and the valve assembly, with the black handles and hose visible from the side.
attribute_label_or_signage: A large, rectangular label with Korean text and pictograms is present on the front of the cylinder, white background with red and black markings.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A black hose is attached to the brass valve at the top, ending in a black nozzle; the hose is looped and hangs alongside the cylinder.
